n_gon.label: Gon Freecss
n_gon.description: Gon Freecss. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_start.label: Whale Island · Departure
n_start.description: Gon Freecss sets out from Whale Island to find his father Ging, a two-star Hunter. The starting point of the entire story.

n_ging.label: Ging Freecss
n_ging.description: Gon's father and an off-the-charts elite Hunter. Meeting him is itself the goal of the story.

n_kite.label: Kite
n_kite.description: Ging's student. He saves Gon in the forest and becomes the benefactor who leads him into the Hunter world.

n_mito.label: Mito
n_mito.description: The woman who raised Gon on Whale Island. She fiercely opposed his taking the Hunter Exam at first, but later sent him off.

n_exam.label: Hunter Exam Arc
n_exam.description: A brutal selection for professional Hunter licenses. The meeting point where the main cast first comes together.

n_hisoka.label: Magician Hisoka
n_hisoka.description: A Transmutation Nen user who revels in deadly battles with the strong. A drifter who is neither ally nor enemy.

n_hanzo.label: Hanzo
n_hanzo.description: A ninja who fought Gon fiercely during the Hunter Exam. A fellow exam candidate alongside Kurapika.

n_silva.label: Silva & Zeno
n_silva.description: The head and former head of the assassin Zoldyck family. They embody the family's standing itself.

n_illumi.label: Illumi (Gitarakuru)
n_illumi.description: Killua's eldest brother. He infiltrated the Hunter Exam in disguise as Gitarakuru and controls others with needles.

n_killua.label: Thirst for Freedom
n_killua.description: A boy raised as an assassin. Meeting Gon lets him choose his own way of living.

n_killmerge.label: Killua Joins
n_killmerge.description: Killua becomes Gon's partner. The beginning of one of the series' greatest friendships.

n_kura.label: Last of the Kurta
n_kura.description: A survivor of the Kurta clan, wiped out by the Phantom Troupe. He balances calm reason with burning passion.

n_leorio.label: Dream of Becoming a Doctor
n_leorio.description: A hot-blooded man greedy for money yet driven to medicine by poverty and the loss of a friend. The voice of common sense.

n_tonpa.label: Rookie Crusher Tonpa
n_tonpa.description: A crafty veteran of the Hunter Exam affiliated with the Association. He fails again and again yet never quits, testing newcomers.

n_satotz.label: Examiner Satotz
n_satotz.description: Chief examiner of the 287th Hunter Exam. He guides Gon and the others as the long-distance run examiner.

n_menchi_buhara.label: Menchi & Buhara
n_menchi_buhara.description: The cooking examiner pair for the second phase. Menchi is ultra-strict; Buhara is a Gourmet Hunter who values quantity.

n_pokkle.label: Pokkle
n_pokkle.description: A young Hunter from the same exam cohort. He fights with a bow and poison, and later heads into NGL.

n_ponzu.label: Ponzu
n_ponzu.description: A fellow exam candidate. A girl who uses bee Nen beasts. She too sets out for NGL.

n_geretta.label: Geretta
n_geretta.description: A crafty old Hunter who attacks Gon and the others in the first phase. He ambushes them with snakes and Nen abilities.

n_bodoro.label: Bodoro
n_bodoro.description: An elderly exam participant. Stronger than he looks, but slain by Killua.

n_bodoro_die.label: Bodoro Eliminated
n_bodoro_die.description: Killua finishes Bodoro in a single blow. His assassin nature is laid bare.

n_amori.label: Amori Brothers
n_amori.description: The Amori, Imori, and Umori triplet brothers who challenge Kurapika in the Hunter Exam; later reappear as Troupe-adjacent hires.

n_netero_trio.label: Netero, Bim & Menchi
n_netero_trio.description: The trio who stand before Chairman Netero in the final exam. Each is a top candidate within the Association.

n_examiners.label: Lippo & Riehlvelt
n_examiners.description: The examiner duo who oversee the third phase. They test candidates atop the tower (as mentors).

n_pass.label: Exam Passed
n_pass.description: Gon and his friends obtain their Hunter licenses.

n_canary.label: Butler Canary
n_canary.description: A young butler who serves the Zoldyck family. She blocks intruders at the gate.

n_rescue.label: Rescuing Killua
n_rescue.description: Gon and the others go to Killua's home and bring him back.

n_arena.label: Heaven's Arena Arc
n_arena.description: A tower where the strong compete. The stage that becomes the gateway to the world of Nen.

n_wing.label: Wing
n_wing.description: The teacher who teaches Gon and Killua the fundamentals of Nen.

n_nen.label: Nen · Awakening
n_nen.description: Gon and Killua awaken to Nen and climb one step higher on the ladder of strength.

n_zushi.label: Zushi
n_zushi.description: A polite fellow student of Nen. A disciple of Wing.

n_izunavi.label: Nen Master Izunavi
n_izunavi.description: The master who taught Kurapika Nen and "Limitations and Vows." He forged Kurapika, who knew nothing of Nen, into a first-rate Nen user in just half a year.

n_kura_nen.label: Learning Nen
n_kura_nen.description: After training under Izunavi, Kurapika gains the Nen abilities he needs to crush the Troupe.

n_melody.label: Senritsu (Melody)
n_melody.description: A Music Hunter and bodyguard for Neon Nostrade from the Yorknew arc; an Emitter who fascinates and analyses targets through her flute. Once warped by hearing the cursed Sonata of Darkness. In the Succession War she is hired by Kurapika and serves as bodyguard to Prince Kacho.

n_neon.label: Neon Nostrade
n_neon.description: The daughter of the mafia Nostrade family. She has a Nen ability that records the future. Kurapika becomes her bodyguard.

n_basho_york.label: Basho (Bodyguard)
n_basho_york.description: Neon's bodyguard. A large Hunter who uses bomb abilities while reciting haiku.

n_squala.label: Squala
n_squala.description: A bodyguard posing as Neon's lover. In truth, he is Uvogin's spy.

n_chrollo.label: Boss Chrollo
n_chrollo.description: Head of the Phantom Troupe. A cold, charismatic leader who steals others' Nen abilities.

n_lovely.label: Angelic Auto Writing
n_lovely.description: Neon's fortune-telling ability. It writes future events out as poetry.

n_york.label: Yorknew Arc
n_york.description: The city arc where the underground auction draws the Troupe and every faction into collision.

n_nobunaga.label: No.1 Nobunaga Hazama
n_nobunaga.description: A master of iaido. A Meteor City native and founding Phantom Troupe member, Uvogin's longtime comrade. An Enhancer who deploys a 4-meter-radius En—the upper limit he himself acknowledges—within which he can slash any target instantly.

n_uvo.label: No.11 Uvogin
n_uvo.description: The Troupe's strongest physical fighter. A proud warrior and Nobunaga's comrade in arms.

n_feitan.label: No.2 Feitan
n_feitan.description: A Transmutation user who loves torture. His Pain Packer turns the pain he receives into aura and releases it.

n_machi.label: No.3 Machi
n_machi.description: An early member who manipulates Nen threads. Loyal to Chrollo, with a caring side for her comrades.

n_phinks.label: No.5 Phinks
n_phinks.description: An Enhancement user whose Ripper Cyclotron grows stronger the more he spins his arm. Among the Troupe's top arm wrestlers.

n_franklin.label: No.7 Franklin
n_franklin.description: A huge man who sprays Nen bullets from his fingertips. An early member.

n_shalnark.label: No.6 Shalnark
n_shalnark.description: Black Voice lets him control anyone he plants an antenna in. The Troupe's information specialist.

n_shizuku.label: No.8 Shizuku
n_shizuku.description: She controls the vacuum Nen beast Blinky, which sucks up anything except living creatures. The Troupe's evidence disposal specialist.

n_bonolenov.label: No.10 Bonolenov
n_bonolenov.description: A dancer (bap) wrapped head to toe in bandages. A descendant of an extinct minority who fights as if dancing.

n_gallery.label: Gallery Fake
n_gallery.description: Kortopi's copy ability. It creates meticulous fakes of anything he touches.

n_paku.label: Pakunoda
n_paku.description: A Troupe woman who reads and fires memories. Deeply devoted to her comrades.

n_skill.label: Bandit's Secret
n_skill.description: Chrollo's core ability: sealing others' Nen abilities in a book and using them freely. A Skill Hunter.

n_steal.label: Stealing Neon's Ability
n_steal.description: Chrollo steals Neon's Angelic Auto Writing.

n_emperor.label: Emperor Time
n_emperor.description: Kurapika's trump card: trading his life to maximize every Nen category (Emperor Time).

n_uvodie.label: Uvogin Killed (Scarlet Chain)
n_uvodie.description: Kurapika's chains kill Uvogin. The "kill" aspect of the Scarlet Chain.

n_seal.label: Chrollo Sealed by Chains
n_seal.description: Kurapika's chains seal Chrollo's Nen. Bind without killing—the "bind" aspect of the Scarlet Chain.

n_squala_die.label: Squala Killed by Nobunaga
n_squala_die.description: After extracting chain-user info, Nobunaga kills Squala; his lover Eliza survives.

n_zeno_york.label: Zeno Zoldyck Intervenes
n_zeno_york.description: Hired as mercenaries, Zeno and Silva fight the Troupe. Their intervention also becomes the trigger to undo Kurapika's seal.

n_kalluto.label: Kalluto
n_kalluto.description: Killua's younger brother. He follows his brother's trail and throws himself into the Troupe.

n_pakudie.label: Pakunoda's Death (Passing Memories)
n_pakudie.description: Pakunoda leaves her memories with her comrades and dies on her own terms.

n_kallutojoin.label: New Member Kalluto
n_kallutojoin.description: Kalluto fills the Troupe's vacant slot.

n_gi.label: G.I. Arc
n_gi.description: The legendary game world Ging was involved in. A stage for training and growth.

n_bisky.label: Biscuit Krueger (Bisky)
n_bisky.description: With a lovely appearance, but in truth a veteran Nen master. She hammers the two boys into shape.

n_razor.label: No.14 Razor
n_razor.description: G.I.'s toughest guardian. He tests Gon and the others with his Explosion-type Nen ability, No.14 (Destroy).

n_goreinu.label: Goreinu
n_goreinu.description: A Manipulator who commands black and white gorilla Nen beasts. Black Voice (Black Goreinu) anchors a place-swap teleportation. He partners with Gon and Killua in Greed Island.

n_tsezguerra.label: Tsezguerra
n_tsezguerra.description: A veteran G.I. challenger. He gives Gon and the others trials and advice.

n_bopobo.label: Bopobo
n_bopobo.description: A giant fisherman. He meets Gon and the others on the sea of G.I.

n_train.label: Training
n_train.description: Under Biscuit, Gon and Killua grow dramatically stronger.

n_bara.label: Bara
n_bara.description: A bomber on Genthru's side. One of a trio aiming to clear G.I.

n_genthru.label: Bomb Devil Genthru
n_genthru.description: A ruthless bomber who tries to dominate G.I.

n_sub.label: Sub
n_sub.description: One of Genthru's trio. A contact-type bomb ability user.

n_bomb_die.label: Bara & Sub Defeated
n_bomb_die.description: Gon, Killua, and Biscuit defeat two of Genthru's allies.

n_genthrudie.label: Defeated
n_genthrudie.description: Gon defeats Genthru with a self-sacrificing blow.

n_growth.label: Dramatic Nen Growth
n_growth.description: Gon and Killua reach first-rate fighting strength.

n_ant.label: Chimera Ant Arc
n_ant.description: The threat of ants that devour humans to evolve. One of the series' heaviest long arcs.

n_kitescout.label: Scouting in NGL
n_kitescout.description: Kite senses the unknown threat early and enters the field to investigate.

n_pokkle_die.label: Pokkle Killed
n_pokkle_die.description: Attacked by Squadron Leader Colt in NGL, Pokkle becomes food for the ants.

n_ponzu_die.label: Ponzu Killed
n_ponzu_die.description: Attacked by Rammot, she dies in the forests of NGL.

n_queen.label: Queen & Squadron Leaders
n_queen.description: The queen who births the King, and the officers who evolve into human form.

n_alluka.label: Alluka & Nanika
n_alluka.description: Killua's sister, and Nanika—the being within her who grants wishes.

n_cheadle.label: Cheadle, New Chairman
n_cheadle.description: An upright medical Hunter. She becomes the new chairman.

n_colt.label: Colt
n_colt.description: One of the humanized Squadron Leaders. He later defects to the human side and saves Gon.

n_colt_turn.label: Colt Surrenders
n_colt_turn.description: After his sister Reina is killed, Colt cradles her reborn-as-baby form and surrenders to the extermination team — the first sign that Chimera Ants have family bonds and humanity.

n_elect.label: Chairman Election Arc
n_elect.description: After Netero's death, a struggle for control of the Association unfolds.

n_gonsan.label: Adult Gon
n_gonsan.description: Gon transforms into his strongest form at the cost of his entire future and defeats Pitou.

n_guarddie.label: Pouf & Youpi Perish
n_guarddie.description: At the end of poison and exhaustion, the Royal Guards too are gone.

n_heart.label: A Heart Takes Root
n_heart.description: Through games with Komugi, "humanity" begins to sprout in the King.

n_ikalgo.label: Ikalgo (Defection)
n_ikalgo.description: An ant who bonds with Killua and sides with humanity. A symbol of friendship across species.

n_ikalgojoin.label: Ally
n_ikalgojoin.description: Ikalgo becomes fighting strength on the extermination side.

n_kannon.label: 100-Type Guanyin Bodhisattva
n_kannon.description: The embodiment of Nen at supersonic speed, perfected through prayer.

n_kingfall1.label: Mutual Kill
n_kingfall1.description: Netero drives poison into the King along with his own life, and they pierce each other.

n_kingfall2.label: The King Falls
n_kingfall2.description: The King quietly breathes his last beside Komugi.

n_kitedie.label: Kite Killed (Pitou)
n_kitedie.description: Pitou takes Kite's life. The trigger for Gon's rage.

n_knov.label: Knov
n_knov.description: A Conjuration user who deploys a four-dimensional apartment. He partners with Morel to investigate NGL.

n_knuckle.label: Knuckle Bine
n_knuckle.description: Amortizing Power Redirector lends aura to opponents. The key to the fight against Youpi.

n_komugi.label: Gungi Prodigy Komugi
n_komugi.description: A blind girl and the absolute champion of Gungi. The only one who changes the King's heart.

n_lastgame.label: Final Match
n_lastgame.description: Poisoned, the King plays one last game of Gungi with Komugi.

n_leorioback.label: Leorio Returns
n_leorioback.description: Leorio comes back to the center of the story.

n_leoriozodiac.label: Joining the Zodiac
n_leoriozodiac.description: Leorio takes a seat among the Association's executives, the Zodiac.

n_meleoron.label: Meleoron
n_meleoron.description: A chameleon-type Squadron Leader. His invisibility ability toys with Gon and the others.

n_meruem.label: King Meruem Born
n_meruem.description: The ant King born as the apex of all living things. Overwhelming and alone.

n_morel.label: Morel Mackernasey
n_morel.description: A category that amplifies aura through smoking. A veteran Hunter and de facto leader of the extermination team.

n_netero.label: Chairman Netero
n_netero.description: Chairman of the Hunter Association and humanity's strongest old warrior.

n_newregime.label: New Regime
n_newregime.description: The Association's new leadership takes shape.

n_palm.label: Palm Siberia
n_palm.description: A Nen user who petrifies. She later tilts toward the ants under Pouf's scales, but regains her will.

n_pariston.label: Pariston's Schemes
n_pariston.description: The former vice chairman who loves chaos. He throws the election into turmoil.

n_peggy.label: Peggy
n_peggy.description: A Squadron Leader who plans strategy. He commands the NGL invasion.

n_pitou.label: Pitou
n_pitou.description: Among the strongest Royal Guards. A Necromancer who manipulates techniques even after death. They bury Kite.

n_pitoudie.label: Pitou Destroyed
n_pitoudie.description: Adult Gon erases Pitou with a single blow.

n_pouf.label: Pouf
n_pouf.description: A Royal Guard who worships the King. A schemer who controls hearts with his scales.

n_punch.label: Punching Ging
n_punch.description: Worried for Gon, Leorio punches Ging in front of everyone—a legendary moment.

n_rammot.label: Rammot
n_rammot.description: A Squadron Leader who senses Nen with his antennae. He attacks Ponzu and fights Gon and the others.

n_reunion.label: Father and Son Reunited
n_reunion.description: Gon finally faces his father Ging. A milestone in one journey.

n_revive.label: Gon Revived
n_revive.description: Nanika's power fully heals Gon, who had lost his Nen and lay near death.

n_shoot.label: Shoot McMahon
n_shoot.description: A Transmutation user whose Nen beasts "erase" parts of the enemy's body. He contributes greatly in the fight against Pitou.

n_team.label: Extermination Team (Morel & Knov)
n_team.description: Elite professional Hunters gathered to exterminate the ants.

n_tree.label: Top of the World Tree
n_tree.description: Ging waits for Gon atop the World Tree.

n_welfin.label: Welfin
n_welfin.description: A dog-like Squadron Leader. He later sides with Ikalgo alongside Meleoron.

n_welfin_join.label: Welfin Joins
n_welfin_join.description: Welfin and Meleoron join the human intelligence network through Ikalgo.

n_wish.label: The Cost of a Wish
n_wish.description: Nanika's power demands an equivalent price. Killua risks everything to make his wish.

n_youpi.label: Youpi
n_youpi.description: A Royal Guard of the King. A pure mass of combat instinct.

n_zazan.label: Zazan
n_zazan.description: A Squadron Leader directly under the Queen. She builds her own nest and rules humans.

n_zero.label: Zero Hand
n_zero.description: A final move wagered on his life. It releases lethal poison upon the King.

n_dark.label: Dark Continent Arc
n_dark.description: The opening of a new great voyage toward lands humanity has never tread.

n_beyond.label: Beyond Netero
n_beyond.description: Chairman Netero's son. An ambitious man who leads the Dark Continent expedition.

n_calamity.label: Five Great Calamities
n_calamity.description: A cluster of threats on a human scale lurking in the Dark Continent.

n_vshisoka.label: Vs. Hisoka (Borrowed Abilities)
n_vshisoka.description: Chrollo combines stolen abilities and defeats Hisoka.

n_shaldie.label: Shalnark & Kortopi Killed
n_shaldie.description: After losing to Chrollo and dying, Hisoka is revived by his own post-death Nen and begins hunting the Troupe; Kortopi and Shalnark are the first casualties.

n_hunt.label: Hunting the Troupe (Revival)
n_hunt.description: Hisoka, revived from death, declares he will annihilate the Troupe.

n_illumi_troupe.label: Illumi Joins as No.11
n_illumi_troupe.description: At Hisoka's request, Illumi Zoldyck joins the Phantom Troupe to fill Uvogin's vacant No. 11 seat—an infiltration aligned with Hisoka's hunt for Troupe members aboard the succession-war ship.

n_princes.label: Kakin's 14 Princes
n_princes.description: Fourteen princes of Kakin who kill one another for the throne.

n_benjamin.label: First Prince Benjamin
n_benjamin.description: Supreme commander of the Kakin military. He seeks the throne with overwhelming charisma.

n_camilla.label: Second Prince Camilla
n_camilla.description: Second Prince of Kakin. A beautiful, haughty woman who cannot tolerate things not going her way. She recruits the Have-Nots caste as her private soldiers. Separate from her Guardian Spirit Beast, she possesses her own Nen ability 'The Cat That Lived a Million Times'.

n_zhang.label: Third Prince Zhang Lei
n_zhang.description: A prince with ties to the Chinese underworld. He also has dealings with the Troupe.

n_tubeppa.label: Fifth Prince Tubeppa
n_tubeppa.description: A prince of a conservative political faction. She pursues a steady succession strategy.

n_tyson.label: Sixth Prince Tyson
n_tyson.description: The prince Izunavi bodyguards. Eccentric, but with sharp insight.

n_luzurus.label: Seventh Prince Luzurus
n_luzurus.description: A prince who loves wine and women. He seems frivolous, but his Nen beasts are formidable.

n_sale.label: Eighth Prince Sale-Sale
n_sale.description: A prince with a childlike appearance. He controls multiple Nen beasts.

n_halkenburg.label: Ninth Prince Halkenburg
n_halkenburg.description: An idealistic prince. He gathers popular support.

n_kacho.label: Tenth Prince Kacho
n_kacho.description: Sister of the prince Basho guards. She uses poison Nen beasts.

n_fugetsu.label: Eleventh Prince Fugetsu
n_fugetsu.description: Kacho's twin sister. Wields an intricate Nen-beast ability.

n_momoze.label: Twelfth Prince Momoze
n_momoze.description: The prince Senritsu guards. She gives a gentle impression.

n_marayair.label: Thirteenth Prince Marayam
n_marayair.description: A prince with religious charisma. He leads his own sect.

n_woble.label: Fourteenth Prince Woble
n_woble.description: The young fourteenth prince. The crux of the succession war, with Kurapika as his direct bodyguard.

n_succession.label: Succession War (Nen Beasts)
n_succession.description: A locked-room succession war aboard the ship, where Nen beasts bound to each prince intertwine.

n_bill.label: Bill (Association Hunter)
n_bill.description: A Beast Hunter sent by the Hunter Association on Beyond's V6 mission; cooperates with Kurapika's group as part of Prince Woble's bodyguard team.

n_tser.label: Tserriednich (Scarlet Eyes)
n_tser.description: The fourth prince. Cruel and brilliant, he holds stolen Scarlet Eyes. Kurapika's sworn enemy.

n_bisky2.label: Biscuit Enters the War
n_bisky2.description: Hired by Kurapika through Killua's introduction, she reappears as a bodyguard. She supports Prince Woble's camp.

n_senritsu.label: Senritsu Returns
n_senritsu.description: Senritsu—away since the Yorknew arc—rejoins Kurapika's camp, deployed as bodyguard to Prince Kacho in the Succession War.

n_izunavi2.label: Izunavi Enters the War
n_izunavi2.description: At his student Kurapika's request, he infiltrates the succession war as bodyguard to Sixth Prince Tyson. His first appearance in the present story since the flashback.

n_hanzo2.label: Hanzo Enters the War
n_hanzo2.description: Fellow exam candidate Hanzo is also hired by Kurapika and joins as a prince's bodyguard.

n_team_kura.label: Forming Kurapika's Bodyguard Team
n_team_kura.description: Aiming to reach Tserriednich who holds Scarlet Eyes, Kurapika hires Basho, Senritsu, Hanzo, his master Izunavi, and Biscuit, forming a bodyguard team for Prince Woble.

n_troupe_origin.label: Phantom Troupe Origins (Flashback)
n_troupe_origin.description: Flashback scenes depict young Chrollo and Meteor City orphans, foreshadowing the founding of the Phantom Troupe.

n_ship.label: Battle Aboard the Ship
n_ship.description: The Troupe, princes, and Association cross paths on the same ship—the current front line.

n_w_bat.label: Bat
n_w_bat.description: Bat. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_frog.label: Frog
n_w_frog.description: Frog. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_antokiba_trade_shop_npc.description: Antokiba Trade Shop NPC. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_assassin_d.description: Assassin D. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_asta.description: Asta. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_auctioneer.label: Auctioneer
n_w_auctioneer.description: Auctioneer. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_baise.label: Baise
n_w_baise.description: A Manipulator at the Underground Auction whose ability Instant Lover entrances anyone she touches. During the Phantom Troupe's raid she fights alongside Phinks and Tocino, but is killed when Shizuku strikes her from behind, smashing her head with Blinky; her corpse is then inhaled by the same Nen vacuum.

n_w_baital.label: Baital
n_w_baital.description: Baital. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_baka_ki_el_dogra.label: Baka Ki El Dogra
n_w_baka_ki_el_dogra.description: Baka Ki El Dogra. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_balda.label: Balda

n_w_royal_guards.label: Royal Guards
n_w_royal_guards.description: The three Royal Guards born from eggs together with King Meruem: Neferpitou (Doctor Blythe / Terpsichora), Shaiapouf (Beelzebub / Spiritual Message), and Menthuthuyoupi (Metamorphosis). Each holds distinct authority but defers everything to protect the King.

n_w_sabazushi.label: Sabazushi

n_w_saccho_kobayakawa.label: Saccho Kobayakawa
n_w_saccho_kobayakawa.description: Zodiac Horse. A two-star Problem Hunter, detective, and jack-of-all-trades; the Zodiacs' counsellor. A horse-faced man with shaggy hair, carrying twin swords. Aboard the B/W he stands watch over Beyond's detention room with Kanzai and Saiyu.

n_w_sadaso.label: Sadaso
n_w_sadaso.description: Sadaso. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_saiyu.label: Saiyu
n_w_saiyu.description: Zodiac Monkey. A Bounty Hunter and martial artist, styled like Sun Wukong with an extending staff and a foul mouth. In truth, he is in cahoots with Pariston to engineer Beyond's release, posted at Beyond's detention room aboard the B/W (with Kanzai and Saccho) precisely to act as the inside man. Wields three monkey Nen-beasts—See-No-Evil, Hear-No-Evil, Speak-No-Evil—that strip sight, hearing, and speech from targets.

n_w_sakisuke_njiji.label: Sakisuke Njiji
n_w_sakisuke_njiji.description: Sakisuke Njiji. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_salkov.label: Salkov
n_w_salkov.description: One of Prince Tserriednich's private soldiers, an associate Hunter Association member and Nen user. He can speak candidly with Theta as a fellow Nen user. Takes over Nen instruction when Theta is too drained to continue.

n_w_sanbica_norton.label: Sanbica Norton
n_w_sanbica_norton.description: Sanbica Norton. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_sayird.label: Sayird
n_w_sayird.description: A professional Hunter in Prince Woble's camp, an Emitter with parted-7:3 hair and a goatee. Hired via Pariston as an Association-Exclusive Hunter and unaware of the succession war. Puppeted by Momoze's Guardian Spirit Beast, he kills Kurton and two other guards before being arrested.

n_w_sedokan.label: Sedokan
n_w_sedokan.description: Sedokan. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_shadow_beasts.label: Shadow Beasts
n_w_shadow_beasts.description: The Ten Dons’ elite execution squad, each using an animal codename. They guarded the Yorknew underground auction and were wiped out fighting the Phantom Troupe.

n_w_shark.label: Shark
n_w_shark.description: Shark. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_sheila.label: Sheila
n_w_sheila.description: A female adventurer from Meteor City. A childhood friend of Chrollo and the founding Phantom Troupe members—especially close to Sarasa. After a tragic event involving Sarasa she breaks with Chrollo's circle and pursues a Hunter's path. Collapses in the Kurta forest, where young Kurapika and Pairo find her; she tells them of the outside world.

n_w_squadron_leaders.label: Squadron Leaders
n_w_squadron_leaders.description: Senior Chimera Ant officers commanding mid-tier units under the Royal Guards. Representative figures include Leol (Lion / Rental Pod), Cheetu (Cheetah / hyper-speed), Peggy (Spider / Love Shower), Zazan (Snake-woman / Meteor City invasion), Flutter (Winged / Satellite Dragonfly), Colt (later defects to the human side), Hina, Pekuba, Pell, and others. The squadron leaders led the Ants' expansion from NGL outward.

n_w_ten_dons.label: Ten Dons
n_w_ten_dons.description: The ten elder bosses at the apex of the Yorknew mafia world, presiding over the Underground Auction. Wiped out in the Phantom Troupe raid pursuing the Scarlet Eyes.

n_w_teradein_neutral.label: Teradein Neutral
n_w_teradein_neutral.description: Teradein Neutral. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_theta.label: Theta
n_w_theta.description: One of Prince Tserriednich's private soldiers, a Nen user and associate Hunter Association member. Alarmed by the Prince's psyche, she lures him into Zetsu—dispersing his Guardian Spirit Beast—and shoots him, only for his Foresight (Instant Lover) ability to evade her. Spared, yet later marked by the beast's strikes that mar the left side of her face.

n_kurapika_flashback.description: Volume 0 one-shot: Kurapika’s childhood in the Kurta Clan and his bond with Pairo.

n_genei_group.description: A band of Nen users marked with spider tattoos, infamous for the Kurta Clan massacre.

n_hunter_assoc.description: The global organization overseeing professional Hunters, the Chairman, and the Zodiacs.

n_zodiac_twelve.label: Zodiacs
n_zodiac_twelve.description: The Hunter Association’s top executives, codenamed after the Chinese zodiac.

n_hisoka_chrollo.label: Hisoka vs. Chrollo
n_hisoka_chrollo.description: Hisoka and Chrollo face off as Heavens Arena floor masters.

n_dark_expedition.description: Beyond Netero’s team of Temp Hunters and mercenaries bound for the Dark Continent.

n_kyosho.label: Restricted Access Hunters
n_kyosho.description: The V5 nations’ joint intelligence unit monitoring the Dark Continent expedition.

n_nasubi.label: Nasubi Hui Guo Rou
n_nasubi.description: King of the Kakin Empire. He announces the Dark Continent expedition and backs Beyond’s team.

n_succession_arc.label: Succession Contest Arc
n_succession_arc.description: The Kakin princes’ deadly succession war aboard the Black Whale en route to the New Continent.

n_k_anesuto.description: Anesuto. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_anzel.label: Anzel
n_k_anzel.description: Anzel. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_babimyna.label: Babimyna
n_k_babimyna.description: Successor to Vincent, sent to Prince Woble's side. Despite a youthful appearance, he is a skilled operator that even Kurapika respects. His ability is a counter-type with a wide-range En. Kurapika and Sakata are his prime targets.

n_k_bachaem.label: Bachaem
n_k_bachaem.description: A bowl-cut guard belonging to Queen Seiko. Struggles with the fact that—since the retainers are five spies and noncombatants—the camp is in effect defended by just two.

n_k_balsamilco_might.label: Balsamilco Might
n_k_balsamilco_might.description: Sergeant Major and chief of Benjamin's private soldiers; also his strategist. A small, weathered older man with a scar across the left side of his face. He grasps his master's character well, offers cool counsel, and leads the elite Nen-using troops.

n_k_barrigen.label: Barrigen
n_k_barrigen.description: Barrigen. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_beeta.label: Beeta
n_k_beeta.description: Beeta. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_bille.description: Bille. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_bladge.label: Bladge
n_k_bladge.description: A Queen Tang Zhao Li soldier-spy with a freckled face; holds a chef's license. Arrested as a suspect in Prince Momoze's murder.

n_k_brocco_li.label: Brocco Li
n_k_brocco_li.description: Boss of the Sha-A Family; a middle-aged man with a broccoli-shaped Afro. An illegitimate half-brother of King Nasubi (a 'second-line'), with his ritual scar running across the centre of his face. Stationed on Tier 1 of the B/W ship.

n_k_bucket.label: Bucket
n_k_bucket.description: Bucket. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_burvena.label: Burvena
n_k_burvena.description: Burvena. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_butch.label: Butch
n_k_butch.description: A bald soldier with round eyes and a round nose. Posted to Prince Tubeppa; appears to have been swapped out with Rihan in the second week of the voyage.

n_k_cashew.label: Cashew
n_k_cashew.description: Cashew. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_cavic.label: Cavic
n_k_cavic.description: Cavic. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_chiffon_toto.label: Chiffon Toto
n_k_chiffon_toto.description: Chiffon Toto. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_cleapatro.label: Cleapatro
n_k_cleapatro.description: Chief Justice on Tier 1 of the Kakin Kingdom.

n_k_connelly.label: Connelly
n_k_connelly.description: Connelly. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_coventoba.label: Coventoba
n_k_coventoba.description: A bald giant of a private soldier, sent to Prince Chōrai. Doubles as a Queen Unma soldier and exchanges intel with Queen Duazul's men.

n_k_daemon.label: Daemon
n_k_daemon.description: Daemon. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_deruboro.label: Deruboro
n_k_deruboro.description: Deruboro. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_dogman.label: Dogman
n_k_dogman.description: Dogman. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_duazul_hui_guo_rou.label: Duazul Hui Guo Rou
n_k_duazul_hui_guo_rou.description: Second Queen of Kakin; mother of Princes Camilla (2nd), Tubeppa (5th), Luzurus (7th), and Halkenburg (9th). A reserved figure who currently resides with Camilla and lets her daughter take the lead on succession matters.

n_k_famule.label: Famule
n_k_famule.description: Famule. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_fukataki.label: Fukataki
n_k_fukataki.description: Head butler of Camilla's camp. A non-combatant retainer addressed as 'Baba' by Sarahell, deeply versed in curse lore and advising the private soldiers.

n_k_furichosefu.label: Furichosefu
n_k_furichosefu.description: Furichosefu. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_furykov.label: Furykov
n_k_furykov.description: A combative private soldier with drooping eyebrows. His sharp observation lets him read Nen status and category from subtle physical and aura cues. Joins Kurapika's Nen lectures for intel and to coordinate with Babimyna.

n_k_gadeau.label: Gadeau
n_k_gadeau.description: Gadeau. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_gipper.label: Gipper
n_k_gipper.description: A corporal among Prince Tserriednich's lower-deck private soldiers, with droopy eyes and a shaved head. Commander of the Prince's academy classmates. Trades places with Bokuksen to move to the upper decks during the Morena hunt.

n_k_guerimori.label: Guerimori
n_k_guerimori.description: Guerimori. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_hanal.description: Hanal. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_hashito.label: Hashitou
n_k_hashito.description: One of Prince Chōrai's private soldiers; distinctive fleshy lips. Dispatched to allied Prince Woble's side.

n_k_ittoku.label: Ittoku
n_k_ittoku.description: Ittoku. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_javietti.label: Javietti
n_k_javietti.description: Javietti. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_kaiser.label: Kaiser
n_k_kaiser.description: An agent of the Justice Bureau, a man in glasses and a suit. Assigned to surveil Kacho/Fugetsu's camp following Loberry's arrest, he is moved by Melody's performance and falls for her.

n_k_kako.label: Kako
n_k_kako.description: Kako. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_kanjidol.label: Kanjidol
n_k_kanjidol.description: A round-faced private soldier sent to Prince Luzurus. Reports the suspicious circumstances of Shikaku's death directly to Benjamin and Balsamilco.

n_k_katrono_hui_guo_rou.label: Katrono Hui Guo Rou
n_k_katrono_hui_guo_rou.description: Fourth Queen of Kakin; mother of Prince Tyson (6th). Unseen in the main story.

n_k_ken_i_wang.label: Wang Ken-i
n_k_ken_i_wang.description: Underboss of the Sha-A Family; a bespectacled man. A shrewd operator who allies with the Phantom Troupe while engineering a mutual collapse between the Troupe and the Heil-Ly Family.

n_k_konattsu.label: Konattsu
n_k_konattsu.description: Konattsu. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_kontasutin.label: Kontasutin
n_k_kontasutin.description: Kontasutin. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_koroabde.label: Koroabde
n_k_koroabde.description: Queen Tang Zhao Li's soldier-spy. Works the same rotation as Benjamin's soldier Rihan.

n_k_k_bihi.label: Kōbihi
n_k_k_bihi.description: Kōbihi. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_ladiolus.label: Ladiolus
n_k_ladiolus.description: A non-combatant retainer of Prince Fugetsu's camp; attends Kurapika's Nen lectures.

n_k_laroc.label: Laroc
n_k_laroc.description: A Queen Katrono soldier-spy with a broad forehead and jaw. Arrested as a suspect in Prince Momoze's murder.

n_k_loberry.label: Loberry
n_k_loberry.description: A non-combatant retainer of Prince Kacho's camp. Joins Kurapika's Nen lectures and is fed up with the Prince's selfishness. Used as a possession target by a Kuroboko and arrested as a suspect in Barigen's murder.

n_k_longhi.label: Longhi
n_k_longhi.description: One of Prince Tubeppa's private soldiers; a hollow-cheeked woman. Joins Kurapika's Nen lectures.

n_k_luini.label: Luini
n_k_luini.description: A subject of Morena's Loving Étude (Bacterial Infection) in the Heil-Ly Family; a man with a crescent scar on his left cheek. He revels in his newfound Nen and develops Emission-based teleportation, but is killed after taunting Nobunaga.

n_k_lynch_fullbokko.label: Lynch Fullbokko
n_k_lynch_fullbokko.description: A Shuu-U Family member; a perpetually combative woman. Hunting Hisoka, she punches Bonolenov (disguised as Hisoka) and is knocked out by the counter; afterwards, having recognised the impostor, she is killed (her neck twisted) by Bonolenov disguised as Zakuro. Her ability is Body and Soul.

n_k_macne.label: Macne
n_k_macne.description: Macne. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_madwig.label: Madwig
n_k_madwig.description: Madwig. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_makaha.label: Makaha
n_k_makaha.description: Makaha. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_maor.label: Maor
n_k_maor.description: Lieutenant and captain of Prince Tubeppa's private soldiers; a mature Shingen-ryu shinobi soldier. Joins Kurapika's Nen lectures and acts proactively as the Prince's surrogate.

n_k_mark.label: Mark
n_k_mark.description: Mark. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_morena_prudo.description: Morena Prudo. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_moswana.label: Moswana
n_k_moswana.description: One of Prince Camilla's private soldiers, mole on her right jaw. Assigned curse target: Prince Benjamin.

n_k_mushaho.label: Mushaho
n_k_mushaho.description: Captain of Queen Swinko-Swinko's soldiers; rugged-faced. Attends Kurapika's Nen lectures—pushed out of Prince Salé-salé's chambers but considering this the critical mission only he can shoulder.

n_k_musse.label: Musse
n_k_musse.description: A private soldier with mismatched eyes, dispatched to Prince Camilla. Uses bird-shaped Nen beasts for surveillance. When Camilla declares she will kill Benjamin, he shoots her—only to be killed by her counter-Nen, his life consumed to revive her. His ability passes to Benjamin.

n_k_nagmum.label: Nagmum
n_k_nagmum.description: A Queen Seiko soldier-spy. Arrested as a suspect in Prince Momoze's murder.

n_k_naik_ru.label: Naikēru
n_k_naik_ru.description: Naikēru. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_narumi_mcgait.label: Narumi McGait
n_k_narumi_mcgait.description: Narumi McGait. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_nikoraurusu.label: Nikoraurusu
n_k_nikoraurusu.description: Nikoraurusu. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_nipaper.label: Nipaper
n_k_nipaper.description: A Queen Duazul soldier-spy with glasses and a bumpy chin. Arrested as a suspect in Prince Momoze's murder.

n_k_notre.label: Notre
n_k_notre.description: Notre. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_nugui.label: Nugui
n_k_nugui.description: The royal household's butler, a small older man. Under King Nasubi's orders, he presided over the Vessel-Egg Ceremony.

n_k_nukuocon.label: Nukuocon
n_k_nukuocon.description: Nukuocon. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_odessa.label: Odessa
n_k_odessa.description: Odessa. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_oito_hui_guo_rou.label: Oito Hui Guo Rou
n_k_oito_hui_guo_rou.description: Eighth Queen of Kakin; mother of Prince Woble (14th). An intelligent, kind-hearted woman who rose from poverty after the king took notice of her. Her lowest-rank status puts her and her child in mortal danger, prompting her to seek a way out of the succession war by contracting Kurapika as a bodyguard, and to begin learning Nen herself.

n_k_onior_longbao.label: Onior Longbao
n_k_onior_longbao.description: Onior Longbao. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_orarge.label: Orarge
n_k_orarge.description: Orarge. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_orau.label: Orau
n_k_orau.description: A balding private soldier dispatched to Prince Tyson.

n_k_otocin.label: Otocin
n_k_otocin.description: Otocin. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_padaille.label: Padaille
n_k_padaille.description: Padaille. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_perigord.label: Perigord
n_k_perigord.description: Perigord. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_peuckert.label: Peuckert
n_k_peuckert.description: An investigator on the V5's International Permit Agency Special Task Force. Together with Steiner, he boards the B/W as a Beyond monitor.

n_k_quorolle.label: Quorolle
n_k_quorolle.description: Quorolle. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_renko.label: Renko
n_k_renko.description: A black-clad woman embalmer of Meteor City. She restored Sarasa's body and is also depicted as the Nen mentor of Machi and Pakunoda.

n_k_rice.label: Rice
n_k_rice.description: A goateed soldier of Queen Duazul. Speaks with Benjamin's soldier Shikaku through an intercom and witnesses Shikaku's suicide.

n_k_rihan.label: Rihan
n_k_rihan.description: A slender-eyed soldier with a long braid; a Conjurer. His ability Predator grows a counter-beast inside himself to 'prey upon' a target's Nen. He neutralised Salé-salé's Guardian Spirit Beast. Reassigned Fugetsu → Tubeppa; strategically the main weapon against Halkenburg.

n_k_ryoji.label: Ryoji
n_k_ryoji.description: A guard belonging to Queen Seiko.

n_k_r_uen.label: Rēuen
n_k_r_uen.description: Rēuen. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_sakata.label: Sakata
n_k_sakata.description: One of Prince Chōrai's private soldiers, dark hair parted 7:3. Dispatched to allied Prince Woble's side, he watches Kurapika closely and carries high-powered 9mm Parabellum rounds.

n_k_sandra.label: Sandra
n_k_sandra.description: Queen Oito's attendant. Stayed with her even after the guards were killed, only to be murdered by Benjamin's soldier Vincent in a fabricated frame-up of being an assassin.

n_k_sarahell.label: Sarahell
n_k_sarahell.description: Captain of Prince Camilla's private soldiers. Assigned curse target: Prince Woble.

n_k_sarasa.label: Sarasa
n_k_sarasa.description: The youngest girl among Chrollo's childhood circle. She bridged the feud between Chrollo and Uvogin. Killed and her body desecrated by an outsider preying on Meteor City; her remains were restored by Renko and laid to rest by Chrollo and his friends—becoming the foundational scar behind the Phantom Troupe's later code.

n_k_satobi.label: Satobi
n_k_satobi.description: Captain of Queen Duazul's soldiers; a serious-minded middle-aged gentleman. Joins Kurapika's Nen lectures while watching him with marked suspicion.

n_k_seiko_hui_guo_rou.label: Seiko Hui Guo Rou
n_k_seiko_hui_guo_rou.description: Sixth Queen of Kakin; mother of Princes Kacho (10th) and Fugetsu (11th). Holds an openly negative stance toward the succession war.

n_k_sevanti_hui_guo_rou.label: Sevanti Hui Guo Rou
n_k_sevanti_hui_guo_rou.description: Seventh Queen of Kakin; mother of Princes Momoze (12th) and Marayam (13th). She dotes on Marayam while showing little interest in Momoze, and—holding personnel authority over the guards—concentrates her soldiers and retainers on Marayam.

n_k_shedule.label: Shedule
n_k_shedule.description: Shedule. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_shikaku.label: Shikaku
n_k_shikaku.description: A Manipulator among Benjamin's private soldiers, dispatched to Prince Halkenburg. Shot through by Halkenburg's awakened Nen, his body is taken over by Halkenburg's soldier Sumidori. While Sumidori inhabits the body, it shoots itself to investigate Halkenburg's ability, killing the host.

n_k_shimano.label: Shimano
n_k_shimano.description: Queen Oito's attendant. Deeply versed in court matters; her family has served the royals for generations, so she knows the princes' personalities and palace intrigues. When three princes call simultaneously, she sidesteps disaster on the spot by an instant judgement of priority.

n_k_slakka.label: Slakka
n_k_slakka.description: Queen Duazul's soldier-spy; grim-faced. Trades intel with Queen Unma's men (held by Benjamin's soldiers). Dispatched to allied Woble's side to watch over Chōrai's soldiers.

n_k_sodom.label: Sodom
n_k_sodom.description: Sodom. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_souffl.label: Soufflé
n_k_souffl.description: Soufflé. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_steiner.label: Steiner
n_k_steiner.description: A bespectacled young deputy section chief assigned to the Special Task Force of the V5's International Permit Agency. Sharp-minded with an exceptional memory. On his first day he learns of the Dark Continent's calamities and gives a presentation to the V5 leadership. He boards the B/W as Beyond's monitor under Hunter Association protection and is placed within the Kakin Justice Bureau, having memorised the entire Travels in the New World book for his mission.

n_k_sumidori.label: Sumidori
n_k_sumidori.description: One of Prince Halkenburg's private soldiers, short-haired with a pug nose. Through Halkenburg's ability 'A Lonely Boy Shoots a Cruel Bow,' his personality is temporarily transferred into Benjamin's soldier Shikaku's body.

n_k_sun_bin.label: Sun-bin
n_k_sun_bin.description: Sun-bin. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_swinko_swinko_hui_guo_rou.label: Swinko Swinko Hui Guo Rou
n_k_swinko_swinko_hui_guo_rou.description: Fifth Queen of Kakin; mother of Prince Salé-salé (8th). Voices criticism of her only son's indulgent ways.

n_k_tagenpaku.label: Tagenpaku
n_k_tagenpaku.description: Tagenpaku. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_tajao.label: Tajao
n_k_tajao.description: Tajao. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_taler.label: Taler
n_k_taler.description: Taler. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_tamazo.label: Tamazo
n_k_tamazo.description: Tamazo. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_tang_zhao_li_hui_guo_rou.label: Tang Zhao Li Hui Guo Rou
n_k_tang_zhao_li_hui_guo_rou.description: Third Queen of Kakin; mother of Prince Chōrai (3rd). Unseen in the main story.

n_k_tassi.label: Tassi
n_k_tassi.description: Tassi. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_tenftory.label: Tenfuturi
n_k_tenftory.description: One of Prince Chōrai's private soldiers; bespectacled with sharp features. Door-keeper at the Prince's chamber; attends Kurapika's Nen lectures.

n_k_terebellum.label: Terebellum
n_k_terebellum.description: Terebellum. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_tevelares.label: Tevelares
n_k_tevelares.description: Tevelares. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_tsudonke.label: Tsudonke
n_k_tsudonke.description: Tsudonke. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_tuffdy.label: Tuffdy
n_k_tuffdy.description: Queen Swinko-Swinko's soldier-spy; the actual killer of Prince Momoze. Arrested and then killed by Hanzo in retaliation—officially reported as a suicide in detention. Wields a body-clone ability of the same type as Hanzo.

n_k_umanma.label: Umanma
n_k_umanma.description: Umanma. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_unma_hui_guo_rou.label: Unma Hui Guo Rou
n_k_unma_hui_guo_rou.description: First Queen of Kakin; mother of Prince Benjamin (1st) and Prince Tserriednich (4th). Unseen in the main story, yet she runs a surveillance web by placing her soldiers as spies on every other prince.

n_k_vantine.label: Vantine
n_k_vantine.description: Captain of Prince Tserriednich's private soldiers. An elderly soldier with a butler-like demeanor.

n_k_vergei.label: Vergei
n_k_vergei.description: The last surviving of Queen Sevanti's three guard captains. Suspecting the Hunter Association lectures of disguising an internal coup as Nen instruction, he initially dismisses Nen as superstition—until Bisky reveals her true form, at which he softens.

n_k_vic.label: Vic
n_k_vic.description: Vic. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_vict.label: Vict
n_k_vict.description: A bushy-browed, bearded private soldier dispatched to Prince Momoze; arrested on suspicion of her murder and later released. Subsequently sent to Prince Halkenburg, where he fights and loses; his fate is unknown. Ability Tackle Shield is described by Benjamin as an attack-defence combined technique.

n_k_vincent.label: Vincent
n_k_vincent.description: One of Benjamin's private soldiers. A tall, long-faced man with a shaved head; catchphrase 'Yes (ee).' Dispatched to Prince Woble, he murders maid Sandra in a frame-up against the bodyguards, is overpowered, then suicides to protect classified info. His ability passes to Benjamin upon death.

n_k_voconte.label: Voconte
n_k_voconte.description: Voconte. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_wolfe.label: Wolfe
n_k_wolfe.description: A soldier belonging to First Queen Unma. Shot and killed by Prince Camilla.

n_k_woody.label: Woody
n_k_woody.description: A royal-attached guard in Prince Woble's camp. Found dead in fifteen minutes—pierced through and exsanguinated.

n_k_worio_bay.label: Worio Bay
n_k_worio_bay.description: Worio Bay. A character in the Kakin succession contest.

n_k_yokotani.label: Yokotani
n_k_yokotani.description: A criminal-defence lawyer affiliated with the Heil-Ly Family. Wields the Conjuration ability Bokkou (LSDF), a purely defensive technique that, within the family's hideout, moves targets via letters and numbers written on a 'board.'

n_k_yuhirai.label: Yuhirai
n_k_yuhirai.description: One of Prince Halkenburg's private soldiers, droopy slit-eyed. Half-awakened in Nen like all fourteen of his unit due to the Guardian Spirit Beast. Joins Kurapika's Nen lectures.

n_k_yuri.label: Yuri
n_k_yuri.description: A non-combatant retainer of Prince Kacho's camp. Joins Kurapika's Nen lectures and is fed up with the Prince's selfishness.

n_k_yushohi.label: Yushohi
n_k_yushohi.description: A shaven-headed private soldier with assassination-suited ability Stand By Me, which attaches small fly-like Needle Balls to a target. After serving with Prince Fugetsu he moves to Prince Salé-salé and carries out an assassination.

n_k_zakuro_custard.label: Zakuro Custard
n_k_zakuro_custard.description: A Shuu-U Family member; a languid-looking young man who always carries an IV drip. His Manipulator ability Bloody Mary lets him freely control his own blood. The drip serves both as a constraint and a practical resource for the ability.

n_mito_truth.label: Ging Is Alive
n_mito_truth.description: Mito confesses that Gon's father Ging is alive, fixing the quest motive.

n_gon_resolve.label: Setting Out for the Exam
n_gon_resolve.description: Gon resolves to take the Hunter Exam and leaves Whale Island.

n_phase2_cook.label: Phase 2: Cooking
n_phase2_cook.description: Menchi and Buhara's cooking test eliminates most applicants.

n_phase3_tower.label: Phase 3: Trick Tower
n_phase3_tower.description: The cast escapes Trick Tower's maze of traps and choices.

n_phase4_zevil.label: Phase 4: Zevil Island
n_phase4_zevil.description: Tag-hunting survival; each examinee stalks a marked target.

n_phase5_imprint.label: Hisoka's Pledge
n_phase5_imprint.description: At the end of Phase 4 on Zevil Island, Hisoka returns Gon's number tag and vows, 'Grow strong and fight me'—formalising the bond from Phase 1's 'unripe fruit' remark.

n_phase5_hanzogon.label: Hanzo vs Gon
n_phase5_hanzogon.description: In the final tournament, Hanzo concedes to let Gon advance.

n_silva_zeno.label: Silva and Zeno Appear
n_silva_zeno.description: Killua's father Silva and grandfather Zeno are revealed as active assassins.

n_canary_gate.label: Canary Tests the Visitors
n_canary_gate.description: Apprentice butler Canary tests Gon's resolve before opening the gate.

n_zushi_intro.label: Zushi and the Aura Leak
n_zushi_intro.description: Zushi's stray aura prompts Wing to reveal Nen to Gon and Killua.

n_wing_train.label: Training Under Wing
n_wing_train.description: Wing teaches Gon and Killua the four major exercises of Nen.

n_kastro.label: Castro vs Hisoka
n_kastro.description: The doppelgänger Castro is decisively crushed by Hisoka.

n_riehlvelt.label: Gon vs Riehlvelt
n_riehlvelt.description: Gon defeats Riehlvelt to reach the 200th-floor class.

n_hisokagon.label: Hisoka vs Gon (200F)
n_hisokagon.description: Gon lands the punch he owed Hisoka, settling the debt.

n_york_meet.label: Yorknew Reunion
n_york_meet.description: Gon, Killua, Kurapika, and Leorio reunite in Yorknew City.

n_nostrade_hire.label: Joining the Nostrade Family
n_nostrade_hire.description: Kurapika is hired as a Nostrade bodyguard, a stepping stone to recover the Scarlet Eyes.

n_troupe_arrive.label: Troupe Enters Yorknew
n_troupe_arrive.description: The Phantom Troupe gathers in Yorknew to hit the underground auction.

n_auction_open.label: Auction Opens
n_auction_open.description: The underground auction begins; rumors of Scarlet Eyes spread.

n_auction_massacre.label: Auction Massacre
n_auction_massacre.description: The Phantom Troupe wipes out the Ten Dons and Shadow Beasts to take the auction.

n_uvogin_v_shadow.label: Uvogin vs Shadow Beasts
n_uvogin_v_shadow.description: Uvogin alone wipes the Shadow Beasts; Mafia mercenaries then kidnap him.

n_chrollo_silvazeno.label: Chrollo vs Silva & Zeno
n_chrollo_silvazeno.description: The Zoldycks, hired by the Mafia, fight Chrollo; the contract ends before resolution.

n_shadow_disinfo.label: Troupe's Disinformation
n_shadow_disinfo.description: The Troupe seeds rumors of a prophet to wrong-foot the alliance and Kurapika's side.

n_paku_predict.label: Lovely Ghostwriter
n_paku_predict.description: Neon's prophecy hints at Chrollo's fate; Pakunoda later mines and shares the memory.

n_kura_v_troupe.label: Kurapika vs Troupe
n_kura_v_troupe.description: Kurapika's chains pin Troupe members, setting up the hostage exchange for Gon and Killua.

n_hostage_swap.label: Hostage Exchange
n_hostage_swap.description: Pakunoda escorts Gon and Killua to the hostage exchange with Kurapika's camp—final negotiation over Chrollo's chain seal.

n_hisoka_predict.label: Hisoka's Forgery
n_hisoka_predict.description: Hisoka fakes a prophecy to secure a future duel with Chrollo.

n_hisoka_leaves_troupe.label: Hisoka Leaves the Troupe
n_hisoka_leaves_troupe.description: Hisoka leaves the Troupe to pursue a one-on-one duel with Chrollo.

n_york_close.label: Yorknew Closes
n_york_close.description: Yorknew ends; Gon and Killua aim for Greed Island next.

n_gi_auction.label: G.I. Auction
n_gi_auction.description: Battera buys the Zoldycks' G.I. cartridge and offers access slots.

n_gi_test.label: Tsezguerra's Trial
n_gi_test.description: Tsezguerra's Nen test clears Gon and Killua for entry.

n_gi_enter.label: Entering G.I.
n_gi_enter.description: Gon and Killua are warped into Greed Island to follow Ging's trail.

n_bisky_join.label: Bisky Joins
n_bisky_join.description: Bisky takes Gon and Killua as students for serious Nen training.

n_binolt_arc.label: Binolt Training
n_binolt_arc.description: Two weeks of brutal field combat — including fights with Binolt — sharpens their Nen.

n_razor_battle.label: Razor's Dodgeball
n_razor_battle.description: Gon's side defeats Razor at dodgeball to win a restricted card.

n_jin_absent.label: Ging Absent — Meets Kite
n_jin_absent.description: Gon's 'Accompany' search for Ging instead leads him to Ging's apprentice Kite, who withholds Ging's location, frames what being a Hunter means, and points Gon toward the NGL expedition.

n_kite_join.label: Kite Joins
n_kite_join.description: Ging's apprentice Kite reunites with Gon to investigate NGL's anomalies.

n_ngl_revealed.label: Chimera Ant Threat
n_ngl_revealed.description: NGL's missing population is revealed to be Chimera Ant prey, expanding catastrophically.

n_royal_guard_appear.label: Royal Guard Born
n_royal_guard_appear.description: Neferpitou, Menthuthuyoupi, and Shaiapouf emerge as the Royal Guard.

n_meruem_birth.label: Meruem Is Born
n_meruem_birth.description: Meruem violently emerges, killing his mother; the King has arrived.

n_extermination_form.label: Extermination Team Forms
n_extermination_form.description: Under Netero, Morel, Knov, Knuckle, Shoot, and Palm form the extermination team.

n_palm_kite.label: Palm Captured
n_palm_kite.description: Palm is taken by the Ants and later remade; a major loss for the team.

n_pitou_knuckle.label: Knuckle's APR Combat
n_pitou_knuckle.description: Knuckle establishes Nen combat tactics through duels around his APR ability.

n_palace_breach.label: Palace Assault
n_palace_breach.description: Netero, Zeno, Morel, Knuckle, Killua, and Gon storm the East Gorteau palace.

n_netero_zero.label: Netero's Zero Hand
n_netero_zero.description: Netero detonates the Poor Man's Rose, mortally wounding the King and dying himself.

n_pariston_scheme.label: Pariston's Scheme
n_pariston_scheme.description: Pariston manipulates the election to sow rifts inside the Zodiacs.

n_alluka_intro.label: Alluka Appears
n_alluka_intro.description: To save Gon, Killua extracts his sister Alluka from the Zoldyck estate.

n_nanika_wake.label: Nanika Awakens
n_nanika_wake.description: Nanika — the wish-granting presence inside Alluka — manifests.

n_ging_meeting.label: Ging Resurfaces
n_ging_meeting.description: Ging returns to the stage in the election's final phase, moving toward Gon.

n_v6_kakin.label: V6 With Kakin
n_v6_kakin.description: Kakin joins the V5 to form a six-state pact behind the Dark Continent venture.

n_troupe_dc_set.label: Troupe Boards B/W
n_troupe_dc_set.description: The Phantom Troupe also boards the Black Whale; the Chrollo–Hisoka rematch advances.

n_succession_decl.label: King Nasubi Decrees the Contest
n_succession_decl.description: King Nasubi declares the Succession Contest to his 14 princes, announcing the Nen-beast rite.

n_chrollo_aboard.label: Troupe Boards Black Whale
n_chrollo_aboard.description: Chrollo, Machi, Kortopi and other Troupe members board; Hisoka lurks in the lower decks.

n_kurapika_dolphin.label: Kurapika's Dolphin
n_kurapika_dolphin.description: Kurapika's new Conjuration ability extracts the list of Nen users, shaping his defense plan.

n_mafia_aboard.label: Mafia Families Board
n_mafia_aboard.description: Heil-Ly, Sha-A, and Shuu-U mafia families embark, entangling the underworld into the contest.

n_morena_intro.label: Morena Appears
n_morena_intro.description: Heil-Ly's Morena debuts; her 'Happy Sad New Year' triggers mass on-board killing.

n_camilla_return.label: Camilla Resurrected
n_camilla_return.description: After being shot dead by Musse, Camilla's personal Nen ability 'The Cat That Lived a Million Times' (Neko no Namae) activates: a giant black cat Nen beast manifests, crushes her killer Musse, and uses his life to resurrect her (ch 373).

n_princes_intro.label: Princes Introduced
n_princes_intro.description: Benjamin, Camilla, Zhang Lei, and the rest of the 14 princes are framed.

n_kakin_depart.label: Black Whale Departs
n_kakin_depart.description: The Black Whale sets sail for the Dark Continent with princes, guards, and the Troupe aboard.

n_woble_contract.label: Woble Contract
n_woble_contract.description: Kurapika contracts with Queen Oito to protect Prince Woble.

n_nen_grant.label: Nen Beasts Granted
n_nen_grant.description: The Urn Ceremony bestows individualized Nen beasts on all 14 princes.

n_halken_beast.label: Halkenburg's Beast
n_halken_beast.description: Prince Halkenburg's beast reveals a uniquely binding domination ability.

n_beast_rules.label: Beast Rules Revealed
n_beast_rules.description: The beasts grow stronger as other princes die — kicking off mutual assassination.

n_momoze_die.label: Momoze Assassinated
n_momoze_die.description: Prince Momoze is poisoned — the first overt royal kill.

n_kacho_fugetsu.label: Kacho & Fugetsu
n_kacho_fugetsu.description: The twin princesses' escape plan unravels as their beast intervenes.

n_sale_die.label: Salé-salé Assassinated
n_sale_die.description: Prince Salé-salé (8th) is killed by Benjamin's private soldier Yushohi via the assassination ability 'Stand By Me' (How to Make Murder Lawful).

n_kacho_die.label: Kacho's Death
n_kacho_die.description: During the lifeboat escape, Kacho is killed by a swarm of ghostly hands while shielding Fugetsu; her body is later recovered.

n_kacho_beast.label: Beast 'Kacho' Activates
n_kacho_beast.description: Kacho's Guardian Spirit Beast 'Without You' (2-Person Saison) triggers, taking the form of the deceased Kacho and acting to help Fugetsu win the succession war.

n_furyko_intercept.label: Outsiders Infiltrate
n_furyko_intercept.description: External Nen users — Hisoka, Illumi — infiltrate the lower decks and twist the battle.

n_clan_war.label: Heil-Ly vs Sha-A
n_clan_war.description: Mafia families Heil-Ly and Sha-A clash inside the ship, widening the war.

n_halken_followers.label: Halkenburg's Conviction Resonates
n_halken_followers.description: Through Halkenburg's Nen ability 'The Boy Shoots a Cruel Bow', Nen users who resonate with his will begin to gather around him.

n_regalia.label: Kakin's Three Regalia
n_regalia.description: Kakin's three sacred treasures: Seed Urn, Lotus Anchorite, and Sword of Good Omens. In Chapter 406 'Regalia', Chrollo reveals he targets the three as the source of the powerful Nen underpinning the succession contest.

n_regalia_seedurn.label: Seed Urn (Kochūran)
n_regalia_seedurn.description: One of Kakin's three regalia. A ritual urn used by succession contest participants. In the rite, the participant offers a drop of blood and inserts their hand into the urn's mouth, receiving an egg that later hatches into a Guardian Spirit Beast (ch 349).

n_regalia_lotus.label: Lotus Anchorite (Gizazen Butsu)
n_regalia_lotus.description: One of Kakin's three regalia. A sacred object (御神体) that watches over the succession contest.

n_regalia_sword.label: Sword of Good Omens (Kitchōmaru)
n_regalia_sword.description: One of Kakin's three regalia. The sacred sword of succession passed on to the next king.

n_chrollo_arrange.label: Chrollo–Hisoka Setup
n_chrollo_arrange.description: On the ship, Chrollo and Hisoka stage a rematch that drags the Troupe in.

n_troupe_hunt.label: Troupe Hunt Continues
n_troupe_hunt.description: Hisoka's assassination spree on the Troupe continues past Kortopi/Shalnark.

n_kite_young_gon.label: Young Gon Meets Kite
n_kite_young_gon.description: A young Gon meets Kite on Whale Island. Kite tells him Ging is alive and a Hunter, seeding Gon's quest. Shown later as a flashback in the Chimera Ant arc.

n_kite_reborn.label: Kite Reborn as an Ant Baby
n_kite_reborn.description: Pitou's ability reincarnates Kite as a Chimera Ant baby born to the Queen — later reappearing as a girl.

n_kite_reunion.label: Gon Reunites with Reborn Kite
n_kite_reunion.description: After Nanika revives him, Gon visits the Ant colony post-Election and reunites with Kite — now reborn as a girl. A long chapter of his journey closes.

n_gyro_debut.label: Gyro Appears
n_gyro_debut.description: NGL's founder and former king Gyro is shown. Driven by childhood abuse, he aspires to spread evil across the world — the human-side darkness woven into the arc.

n_hisoka_defeated.label: Hisoka's Defeat and Bungee Gum Revival
n_hisoka_defeated.description: Defeated by Chrollo, Hisoka dies as his heart and lungs stop — then his post-death Bungee Gum restarts them, reviving him and setting the Troupe-hunt resolve in motion.

n_w_galactic_matron.label: Galactic Matron
n_w_galactic_matron.description: Galactic Matron. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_juhnde.label: Juhnde
n_w_juhnde.description: Juhnde. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_w_tokharone.label: Tokharone
n_w_tokharone.description: Tokharone. A character from Hunter × Hunter.

n_k_mandam.label: Mandam
n_k_mandam.description: Captain of Queen Duazul's soldiers. His assigned prince is unclear, but he acts as mediator between Queen Duazul's and Queen Unma's soldiers (the latter doubling as Benjamin's private soldiers).

n_k_orzny.label: Orzny
n_k_orzny.description: A soldier belonging to First Queen Unma; previously assigned to monitor Prince Halkenburg.

n_beyond_plan.label: Beyond's Dark Continent Plan Revealed
n_beyond_plan.description: At a V6 conference, it is revealed that Beyond Netero proposed an expedition to the Dark Continent and had secretly allied with King Nasubi Hui Guo Rou.

n_beyond_arrest.label: Beyond Detained
n_beyond_arrest.description: The Hunter Association takes Beyond into custody. New Chairman Cheadle assumes oversight, with the Zodiacs rotating watch duty.

n_beyond_interrogation.label: Beyond Interrogated
n_beyond_interrogation.description: In the detention room aboard the ship, interrogations of Beyond continue. Pariston and others approach him, seeking information on the Dark Continent.

n_pariston_resign.label: Pariston Resigns as Vice-Chairman
n_pariston_resign.description: After the chairman election, Pariston Hill resigns his Zodiac Vice-Chairman post and leaves the Hunter Association, beginning to maneuver freely toward the Dark Continent.

n_ging_truth.label: Revealing the Truth at the World Tree
n_ging_truth.description: Atop the World Tree, Ging tells Gon about Beyond's plan and the truth of the Dark Continent, and expresses his own intent to join the expedition.

n_dc_team.label: Expedition Roster Finalised
n_dc_team.description: Centred on Beyond, the Dark Continent expedition roster is finalised: Ging, Pariston, Zodiac member Dr. Botobai, and Beyond-faction mercenaries (Muherr et al.), with the agreement formalised with the Hunter Association.

n_illumi_reveal.label: Illumi's Identity Revealed
n_illumi_reveal.description: In Phase 5 of the Hunter Exam, 'Gittarackur' is unmasked as Illumi—eldest of the Zoldyck family. With his control needle, he forces Killua to kill Bodoro.

n_illumi_alluka_block.label: Blocking Alluka's Escape
n_illumi_alluka_block.description: As Killua moves to take Alluka out of the estate, Illumi obstructs him by weaponizing family ties and obligations.

n_illumi_pact.label: Hisoka–Illumi Pact
n_illumi_pact.description: Hisoka hires Illumi as accomplice in the Phantom Troupe hunt, plotting member assassinations aboard the ship. Because Hisoka has declared every Troupe member a target, Illumi—who joins the Troupe to carry out the contract—is by terms also among the targets.

n_theta_attempt.label: Theta's Assassination Attempt
n_theta_attempt.description: On the banquet night, Theta lures Tserriednich into prolonged Zetsu during Nen training, dismisses the bodyguards, and produces a gun in an attempt to assassinate him.

n_tser_awaken.label: Tserriednich Awakens His Ability (Flashback)
n_tser_awaken.description: A flashback 25 minutes before Theta's attempt, from Tserriednich's perspective. While in Zetsu, he masters his Nen ability—seeing ten seconds into the future and being the only one able to alter his actions—and uses it to evade the assassination.

n_kura_nen_class.label: Kurapika's Nen Lectures
n_kura_nen_class.description: In Room 1014 aboard the ship, Kurapika teaches Nen to recruits from various princes' camps in exchange for their cooperation with the Woble faction.

n_halken_awaken.label: Halkenburg's Nen Awakens
n_halken_awaken.description: On his way to confront his father King Nasubi, Prince Halkenburg's Nen ability 'A Lonely Boy Shoots a Cruel Bow' manifests—altering the early succession war's strategy.

n_halken_curse.label: Halkenburg's Nen Tested
n_halken_curse.description: To verify the mechanism of Halkenburg's ability 'A Lonely Boy Shoots a Cruel Bow', Sumidori (possessing Shikaku's body) proclaims 'Benjamin' and shoots himself in the head. By observing the soul's behavior after death, they progress their understanding of the ability.

n_chrollo_kidnap_plan.label: Operation: Kidnap Chrollo
n_chrollo_kidnap_plan.description: Gon and Killua draw Nobunaga, Pakunoda, and Kortopi at Hotel Beitacle while, under cover of a blackout, Kurapika kidnaps and restrains Chrollo.

n_kura_face_chrollo.label: Kurapika Faces Chrollo
n_kura_face_chrollo.description: With Chrollo's Nen chain-sealed, Kurapika—eyes blood-red—beats him repeatedly in raw fury. The first direct confrontation with his enemy.

n_k_badoyu.label: Badoyu
n_k_badoyu.description: A subject of the Bacterial Infection. A demolition worker by trade and a thrill-killer. He awakens an ability that conjures weapons in his right hand, but is killed by veteran Hinrigh after a group attack.

n_don_freecss.label: Don Freecss
n_don_freecss.description: Author of 'A Voyage to the New World', the foundational text on the Dark Continent. Said to be roughly 300 years old; per Ging, he may still be alive, currently writing the western volume. Shares the surname Freecss with Gon and Ging, though any kinship is unknown.

n_k_shejell.label: Shejell
n_k_shejell.description: One of Prince Halkenburg's private soldiers; bespectacled with freckles. Half-awakened in Nen like all fourteen of his unit. Attends Kurapika's Nen lectures.

n_ms_elder.label: Meteor City Elder
n_ms_elder.description: One of the Meteor City elders, his face concealed. He enforces Meteor City's law of total retribution. Mastermind of the bombing terror campaign with an ability that turns humans into bombs; though deceased, the ability persists as 'undying Nen of the dead' in Chrollo's collection.

n_ms_risol.label: Father Risol
n_ms_risol.description: A priest of Meteor City's All-Faith Society. Noticing young Chrollo's intellect, he recommended him for an audience with the council of elders.

n_predator_consume.label: Guardian Beast Devoured
n_predator_consume.description: Rihan's Conjuration ability Predator (Stranger) leaps upon Prince Salé-salé's Guardian Spirit Beast and consumes it entirely, neutralising it. Immediately afterward, Rihan requests to swap places with Yushohi.

n_shadow_beasts.label: Shadow Beasts
n_shadow_beasts.description: A ten-member anti-Nen assassination squad serving the Ten Dons, each named after an animal (Owl, Wooden Statue, Bat, Snail, Centipede, Wolf Spirit, and others). Nine were wiped out in a single night by Uvogin alone, and the last (Owl) was captured and tortured by the Phantom Troupe.

n_kurta_clan.label: Kurta Clan
n_kurta_clan.description: A reclusive people whose eyes turn scarlet with rage; those eyes are counted among the world's seven greatest hues of beauty. Annihilated by the Phantom Troupe — Kurapika is the sole survivor.

n_ngl_state.label: NGL (Neo-Green Life Autonomous Region)
n_ngl_state.description: An anti-modernist micro-state founded and ruled by Gyro. Forbidding modern conveniences, its people lived simply—while internally the Chimera Ant Queen was already preying on them.

n_east_gorteau.label: Republic of East Gorteau
n_east_gorteau.description: A dictatorship in the East. Its 'supreme leader' Ming Jol-ik is a double; the real power is vice-president Bizeff. King Meruem's Chimera Ant army takes over the nation wholesale, staging the Selection ceremony there.

n_zazan_squad.label: Zazan Squad (Meteor City Invasion)
n_zazan_squad.description: Chimera Ants under Squadron Leader Zazan who broke from Meruem to act independently, seeking to carve out their own kingdom in Meteor City. Annihilated by the Phantom Troupe (drawn there via Hisoka's lead).

n_eight_queens.label: Eight Queens of Kakin
n_eight_queens.description: The eight official wives of King Nasubi Hui Guo Rou. A strict hierarchy by order of marriage governs them, with senior queens planting spies in the guards of junior princes: Unma, Duazul, Tang Zhao Li, Katrono, Swinko-Swinko, Seiko, Sevanti, Oito.

n_three_mafia.label: The Three Great Mafia Families
n_three_mafia.description: The three syndicates governing Kakin's underworld: Shuu-U Family ('周', backed by Prince Chōrai), Heil-Ly Family ('A', backed by Prince Tserriednich), and Sha-A Family ('射', backed by Prince Luzurus). Aboard the ship they administer Tiers 3-5.

n_benjamin_army.label: Benjamin's Private Soldiers
n_benjamin_army.description: Fifteen elite Nen-using regular soldiers serving Prince Benjamin directly. Led by chief strategist Balsamilco, they are dispatched to other princes as spies, assassins, and intelligence operatives. Members include Vincent, Babimyna, Furykov, Musse, Coventoba, Butch, Orau, Kanjidol, Rihan, Yushohi, Shikaku, Vict, and more.

n_camilla_army.label: Camilla's Private Soldiers
n_camilla_army.description: Prince Camilla's 14-member private guard: Sarahell and Moswana as the leadership pair, eleven curse-bearers each assigned to one of Princes 3rd–13th, and a single exorcist. All come from the persecuted "Untouchables" caste, wearing a distinctive uniform. All bear the shared curse ability Yomotsu Hegui ("Born to Mend Wrongs").

n_halken_legion.label: Halkenburg's Private Soldiers
n_halken_legion.description: Prince Halkenburg's fourteen private soldiers, all in a semi-awakened Nen state due to the Guardian Spirit Beast. United by the feather mark, they channel Halkenburg's arrow ability A Lonely Boy Shoots a Cruel Bow.

n_beyond_faction.label: Beyond Faction
n_beyond_faction.description: The faction led by Beyond Netero. No. 2 is Pariston; the combat arm under mercenary leader Muherr (Mashul, Marione, Pekotero, Golem), scholars (Kururi), the cook (Usameen), and others. Ging later joins their ranks.

n_melody_concert.label: Melody's Concert
n_melody_concert.description: At the ship's banquet Melody performs on flute; her music stirs deep feeling in many listeners — Justice Bureau agent Kaiser is utterly smitten.

n_saiyu_revealed.label: Saiyu Exposed as the Beyond Informant
n_saiyu_revealed.description: Mizaistom confronts all Zodiacs about a traitor in their ranks and discloses his own ability. Watching via a hidden camera from a separate room, Kurapika identifies Saiyu as Beyond's informant.

n_ipa.label: International Permit Agency (IPA)
n_ipa.description: A V5-side international body that, in effect, regulates expeditions to the Dark Continent. Its Special Task Force handles operations and is involved in surveilling and constraining Beyond. Steiner and Peuckert are sent aboard the B/W under the Hunter Association's protection.

n_zoldyck_family.label: Zoldyck Family
n_zoldyck_family.description: One of the world's most renowned assassin families, practicing assassination for generations.

n_nostrade_org.label: Nostrade Syndicate
n_nostrade_org.description: A mafia organization based in York Shin. Its rise is fueled by the future-divination ability of Light Nostrade's daughter Neon. Hires Kurapika and other Nen users as her bodyguard team.

n_shingenryu.label: Shingen-ryu
n_shingenryu.description: A martial arts school that teaches Nen. Both Wing and Biscuit Krueger are disciples of this lineage.

n_zodiac_info.label: Zodiacs (Intelligence Squad)
n_zodiac_info.description: The intelligence division of the Zodiacs. Gathers intel on the succession war and the Dark Continent expedition.

n_zodiac_science.label: Zodiacs (Science Squad)
n_zodiac_science.description: The science / medical division of the Zodiacs, led by the new chairman Cheadle.

n_zodiac_defense.label: Zodiacs (Defense Squad)
n_zodiac_defense.description: The defense / combat division of the Zodiacs, led by Botobai Gigante.

n_greed_island.label: Greed Island Cast
n_greed_island.description: Parties connected to 'Greed Island', the Nen-based game made by Ging and the other ten Game Masters. Includes creators, players, and in-game NPCs.

n_kakin_royal_army.label: Kakin Royal Army
n_kakin_royal_army.description: The regular army of the Kakin Empire. During the succession contest, it guards the royal family and maintains order aboard the ship. Distinct from each prince's private soldier units.

n_have_nots.label: The Have-Nots
n_have_nots.description: A discriminated caste in the Kakin Empire. The bulk of Second Prince Camilla's private army is drawn from them, and they show absolute loyalty to her.

n_mafia_shu_u.label: Xi-Yu Family
n_mafia_shu_u.description: One of Kakin's three great mafia families. Boss: Onior Longbao. Close to Third Prince Zhang Lei. Effectively controls the lower tiers of the ship during the succession war, and plots to capture Hisoka and eliminate Morena.

n_mafia_sha_a.label: Cha-R Family
n_mafia_sha_a.description: One of Kakin's three great mafia families. Boss: Brocco Li. Close to Seventh Prince Luzurus.

n_mafia_aii.label: Heil-Ly Family
n_mafia_aii.description: One of Kakin's three great mafia families. Boss Morena Prudo's betrayal ties them to Fourth Prince Tserriednich. Triggers the on-board 'Happy Sad New Year' Nen-fueled mass killing they call the Carnival.
